version__comment: Schema version for render_config.json. Must be 1.

viewer.up_dir__comment: Polyscope up direction enum. Must be one of x_up, neg_x_up, y_up, neg_y_up, z_up, neg_z_up.
viewer.ground_plane_mode__comment: Polyscope ground plane mode. Must be one of none, tile, tile_reflection, shadow_only.
viewer.transparency_mode__comment: Polyscope transparency mode. Must be one of none, simple, pretty.
viewer.transparency_render_passes__comment: Render pass count used when transparency_mode is pretty. Must be an integer >= 1.

viewer__comment: Global Polyscope viewer defaults applied at startup.

sizestream_mesh.color__comment: Fallback RGB color for the SizeStream mesh.
sizestream_mesh.enabled__comment: Whether the SizeStream mesh should be visible immediately after loading.
sizestream_mesh.smooth_shade__comment: Whether to enable smooth shading for the SizeStream mesh.

render.sizestream_mesh__comment: Render settings for the SizeStream mesh.

sizestream_landmarks.enabled__comment: Whether SizeStream landmarks should be visible immediately after loading.
sizestream_landmarks.radius__comment: Relative point radius for SizeStream landmarks.

render.sizestream_landmarks__comment: Render settings for the SizeStream landmarks.

registered_mesh.color__comment: Fallback RGB color for the registered CAESAR mesh when PLY vertex colors are not available.
registered_mesh.enabled__comment: Whether the registered CAESAR mesh should be visible after ICP registration.
registered_mesh.smooth_shade__comment: Whether to enable smooth shading for the registered CAESAR mesh.

render.registered_mesh__comment: Render settings for the registered CAESAR mesh.

registered_landmarks.color__comment: RGB color for registered CAESAR landmarks.
registered_landmarks.enabled__comment: Whether registered CAESAR landmarks should be visible after ICP registration.
registered_landmarks.radius__comment: Relative point radius for registered CAESAR landmarks.

render.registered_landmarks__comment: Render settings for registered CAESAR landmarks.

caesar_mesh.color__comment: Fallback RGB color for the raw CAESAR mesh when PLY vertex colors are not available.
caesar_mesh.enabled__comment: Whether the raw CAESAR mesh should be visible immediately after loading.
caesar_mesh.smooth_shade__comment: Whether to enable smooth shading for the raw CAESAR mesh.

render.caesar_mesh__comment: Render settings for the raw CAESAR mesh.

caesar_landmarks.color__comment: RGB color for raw CAESAR landmarks.
caesar_landmarks.enabled__comment: Whether raw CAESAR landmarks should be visible immediately after loading.
caesar_landmarks.radius__comment: Relative point radius for raw CAESAR landmarks.

render.caesar_landmarks__comment: Render settings for raw CAESAR landmarks.

landmark_errors.color__comment: RGB color for landmark error vectors.
landmark_errors.radius__comment: Curve radius for landmark error vectors.

render.landmark_errors__comment: Render settings for landmark error vectors.

geodesic_path.color__comment: RGB color for the geodesic path.
geodesic_path.radius__comment: Curve radius for the geodesic path.

geodesic_endpoints.radius__comment: Point radius for geodesic endpoint previews.
geodesic_endpoints.start_color__comment: RGB color for the first selected geodesic endpoint.
geodesic_endpoints.end_color__comment: RGB color for the second selected geodesic endpoint.

render.geodesic_endpoints__comment: Render settings for geodesic endpoint previews.

render__comment: Rendering defaults for meshes, landmarks, error vectors, and geodesic previews.
